special.name: Thecha Bhaat + Maharashtrian Misal
special.tagline: Premium Vegetarian • Home Cooked • Restaurant Relished Experience
special.description: Fiery, hand-pounded green-chilli–garlic thecha folded through ghee-laced rice, alongside a robust Maharashtrian misal crowned with crunchy farsan — finished with two soft pav. Maharashtra's boldest comfort food, made the home way.

mygateMessage:
🌶️ Simply Signature — Saturday Lunch, 18 July 2026 🌶️

This week: Thecha Bhaat + Maharashtrian Misal with soft pav — a full Maharashtrian feast.

Main Combo ₹350 (Thecha Bhaat + Misal + 2 Pav)
Thecha Bhaat 500 ml ₹200 · Misal + 2 Pav ₹150 · Buttered Pav ₹20 each
Only 10–12 portions this week!

100% vegetarian, homemade in small batches at JVT-343.
Order before Friday 9:00 PM on WhatsApp: +91 97658 44659 (Gayathri)
Or order online: https://simplysignature.in/order
